fondo_rating.scoring_notes: Migrated from gravel-race-automation. Original score: 66. adventure dimension dropped, road_surface added. Score recalculated: 61.

logistics.lodging_strategy: Cambria and Paso Robles offer hotels, vacation rentals, and campgrounds. Event is part of a weekend festival format

final_verdict.one_liner: A challenging Central Coast gravel adventure with stunning ocean and wine country views, though event continuity and logistics require verification

youtube_data.search_query: Eroica California gran fondo cycling Cambria

videos.title: Eroica California 2019 A Vintage Bicycle Festival
videos.description: The L'Eroica is a weekend long celebration of cycling history that takes place each year on the Central Coast of California. This year the ride started in Cambria, a bucolic town located North of San Luis Obispo and South of Big Sur. The area is most well known for it's beautiful undeveloped coast line, a perfect place to ride bicycles. This year we ride the Heroic route, a 107 mile mixed terrain ride through the farms, vineyards, and coastal mountains. The ride starts at 5:00 AM and rolls South on Hwy 1 before climbing Santa Rita Creek road. Many participating wineries and businesses provide snacks and beverages along the route. Come along as we meet new and well known friends, attend the concourse bike show, and ride the course.
tags: Eroica California 2019 A Vintage Bicycle Festival

videos.curation_reason: High-quality race documentation with detailed first-person experience of the 107-mile Heroic route starting from Cambria at 5AM.

videos.title: Descending Santa Rosa Road at Nova Eroica California on Campagnolo Levante gravel wheels
videos.channel: PezCyclingNews - What's Cool In Road Cycling
videos.description:
The hilight of riding the 2022 Nova Eroica gravel fondo in Cambria CA was (apart from being one of the first to ride Campagnolo's brand new Levante gravel wheelset) was the epic descent off the top of Cypress Mountain along Santa Rosa road and its 22km descent back to the finish.  

I chased Campagnolo's Arjan Hoogesteger off the mountain, and really got to appreciate the control of the wheels, and power and supreme modulation of Campagnolo's Ekar gruppo disc brakes as we dropped down pitches over 12%.   Then he took the strong headwinds head-on as he towed me to the end - much appreciated.

There's more coming on these wheels - but here's my full video of this awesome descent.

Topics
0:00 - Intro & merryment
0:31 - Campagnolo Levante wheels teaser
1:47 - Gravel descent Start
5:28 - Water stop, pavement descent start
22:00 - In the valley and into the wind
videos.curation_reason: Extended first-person descent footage showcasing the epic 22km Santa Rosa Road descent off Cypress Mountain, key terrain feature of the course.

videos.title: Eroica California 2019
videos.description: The 75 mile "Santa Lucia" route of Eroica California April 7, 2019.

videos.title: L'EROICA - BEST RIDE EVER with Grand Tours Project
videos.description:
Didn't think I'd come away saying that was the best day ride I've ever done; the people, the views, atmosphere, food it was incredible and I 100% recommend it to anyone that can do it. 

Discount code for Grand Tours Project 2024 trips - AMY for 290euros off
https://grandtoursproject.com/cycling-tours/

If you can spare a second to hit subscribe with your pinky that would be awesome. 

We were gifted this trip by Grand Tours Project in return for social media content - MASSIVELY grateful for this opportunity. 

^ Strava - https://www.strava.com/athletes/30216361
^ Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/amy.cycling.adventures/?igshid=YmMyMTA2M2Y%3D
^ Chai latte fund - https://www.buymeacoffee.com/amycyclingadven

If you're riding, enjoy it and stay safe x

The following brands support me by gifting me products, you will see their products in my videos, I'm beyond grateful & in disbelief that I get these opportunities :

Veloforte - https://veloforte.com/pages/about-us 
If you fancy trying the Veloforte snacks AMY-20 = 20% discount
(I do get commission for use of my code) 

SunGod - https://www.sungod.co/s/GHe8c9RS/ 
Garmin - https://www.garmin.com/en-GB/
Quoc Shoes - https://quoc.cc/collections/sho

quotes.text: The ride starts at 5:00 AM and rolls South through the farms, vineyards, and coastal mountains - this is a 107 mile mixed terrain ride with some pretty tall gearing for the steep gravel roads we'll be climbing.
Look who I found cycling out on the roads of Central Coast of California - the food stops is what you do these things for, olive oil french fries and all.

key_challenges.name: Old Creek Road
key_challenges.description: The big climb of the day, experienced in super foggy conditions with very limited visibility.

key_challenges.name: Santa Rita
key_challenges.description: Referenced as a significant point riders need to get over on the longer routes.

terrain_notes.text: Steep gravel roads that require appropriate gearing. One rider noted their tall gearing wasn't ideal for the steep gravel climbs.

gear_mentions.text: 1960s Bianchi 700cc bike with 32 millimeter wide tires described as not your ultimate all road bike but good enough for the course.
Rider noted having pretty tall gearing that wasn't ideal for climbing steep gravel roads.

race_day_tips.text: Early 5:00 AM start time with riders broken into three groups departing five to ten minutes apart.
They want riders to be at the start by 5:30 for the longer routes.

additional_quotes.text: The food stops is what you do these things for. Olive oil french fries.
Doug from lucky duck bicycles in Oakland stopped by and picked up the Jersey that we accidentally left at home in our rush to get out of town.

rider_intel.search_text: Eroica California features a challenging 107-mile course through Central Coast California starting at 5:00 AM from Cambria. The route includes Old Creek Road as the major climb of the day, often experienced in foggy conditions with limited visibility. Riders face steep gravel roads requiring appropriate gearing, with some noting that tall gearing makes the climbs more difficult. The course passes through Santa Rita as a significant waypoint on longer routes. Multiple food stops provide olive oil french fries and other refreshments. Riders are broken into three groups departing five to ten minutes apart, with a 5:30 AM arrival recommended for longer routes. The vintage cycling event attracts riders on period-appropriate bikes, including steel frames from the 1960s-70s with tire widths around 32mm.
